xml.New:
In 1.2.7 Added alerts for Reprotox-IRFMN
In 1.2.6 Modified sulfonic fragment for Meylan Logp (also modifies meylan BCF) Modified -CL aliphatic attack for Meylan Logp (also modifies meylan BCF) Small fix in nRSR and nRSSR functional groups (added exception for C-S-C=S)
In 1.2.5: Modified AD output, now AD assessment provided as a separate column in output Fixed PNG for ER/CERAPP alert set Added Barysz matrix Implemented BIC descriptors (information content) Implemented IVDE Implemented MAXDN, MAXDP Corrected nRNNOx group in Functional Groups count Added catch for error with very long smiles (>1000 atoms) from CDK canonical labeler Added wrapper for Ann models from PMML files Added fix for aromaticity detection for P with valence 5 in rings
In 1.2.4: Extension of Information Content descriptors with CICk series Added hepatotoxicity SAs Added descriptors/fragments for kM
In 1.2.3: Correction for Benigni-Bossa ruleset
In 1.2.2: Correction in similarity calculation for Bray-Curtis index (non binary distance index) to avoid global similarity of zero for strongly different compounds. Correction for Benigni-Bossa SA1 image Correction in description for 2 SA for sediment persistence
